title: Background Runtime
description: Long-running work gets explicit ids, polling, and notifications.

steps.content: Run the slow test suite in the background and tell me when it finishes.
steps.annotation: The user wants progress without blocking the main thread.
The task is handed to the background runtime.
The foreground loop receives a handle it can refer to later.
The model can poll the long-running task explicitly.
Completion is reinjected into the main loop.

steps.content: The background suite finished, and I can now use its result in the next step.
steps.annotation: Background work becomes part of foreground reasoning once notified.
